# Browser Research Session Skill

Use when a task needs a visible web page, login-aware state, form interaction, visual inspection, or explicit evidence capture.

Rules:
- Use API/search routes first when live visual inspection is not required.
- Keep the browser visible and host-mediated.
- Capture evidence when the answer depends on page state.
- Do not enter sensitive data or install extensions without explicit human approval.
- Return final URL, page title, evidence references, and residual risk.
